Appearance

GeniusHRMEnterprise HR Management System

Open-source, modular, built for modern teams. Laravel 13 + React + TypeScript.

Get Started
View on GitHub
👥

Employee Management

Full CRUD with employment history tracking, document management, and auto-generated employee IDs.

🏢

Organizational Structure

Departments, positions, org chart, and reporting hierarchies.

🕐

Attendance & Shifts

Clock-in/out, shift scheduling, and attendance reporting.

🏖️

Leave Management

Leave types, approval workflows, balance tracking, and calendar view.

💰

Payroll & Compensation

Salary structures, payroll runs, payslip generation with PDF download.

📊

Reports & Analytics

Headcount, payroll, attendance, leave, training, and performance dashboards.

🎯

Performance Management

Appraisal cycles, self-assessment, manager ratings, and finalised scores.

📚

Training & Development

Courses, sessions, enrollments, completion tracking, and scoring.

🔐

Role-Based Access Control

6 built-in roles, custom roles, granular permissions matrix.

⚙️

System Administration

SMTP, SMS, branding, audit log, user management all in one panel.

Released under the MIT License.
